ralph-commit.ralph-subject: refactor(prompts): extract commit templates to external files
ralph-commit.ralph-body:
Replace inline prompt strings with external template files for better maintainability.
All commit message generation prompts now use the Template engine with dedicated template files instead of hardcoded strings or format! macros. This separates prompt content from logic and makes updates easier.
Functions refactored: - prompt_strict_json_commit - prompt_strict_json_commit_v2 - prompt_ultra_minimal_commit - prompt_ultra_minimal_commit_v2 - prompt_file_list_only_commit - prompt_emergency_commit - prompt_file_list_summary_only_commit - prompt_emergency_no_diff_commit
